questionHtml: State one reason why the value obtained in part (b) might not be valid.
markschemeHtml:
Accept any valid reason          R1

e.g:

The students in the sample might not be of equal ability / she has not controlled for ability

She might have originally obtained close to full marks so an extra 15.9 would not be possible.         

[1 mark]

meta.title: State one reason why the value obtained in part (b) might not be valid.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.4—Pearsons, scatter diagrams, eqn of y on x
